style: flat 2D vector cartoon, soft rounded shapes, clean bold outlines, warm cheerful color palette, gentle soft lighting, wholesome Islamic children's storybook illustration, expressive friendly faces, simple uncluttered background, high quality
negative: no text, no letters, no words, no caption, no watermark, no signature, no photorealism, no scary or dark themes, no violence, no gore, no clutter, not creepy

khalid.descriptor: Khalid is a cheerful 7-year-old Arab Muslim boy with short neat deep-black hair, large warm brown eyes, soft wheat skin, wearing an elegant black thobe with luminous gold floral and geometric embroidery on collar, cuffs and hem, and an olive-and-gold geometric kufi cap

zina.descriptor: Zina is a sweet 5-year-old Arab Muslim girl with big innocent eyes, rosy cheeks, a small soft-blue headscarf and a light-blue dress (formerly named Noor — same character, renamed)

teta.descriptor: Teta is a kind elderly Arab Muslim grandmother with warm caring eyes, gentle wrinkles, thin glasses, a soft cream hijab, cozy olive-and-maroon clothes and a gentle wise smile

gido.descriptor: Gido is a kind elderly Arab Muslim grandfather with warm wise eyes, gentle smile lines, a neat short white-grey beard, a soft white or grey thobe and a white kufi cap (taqiyah), warm and gentle

abdulrahman.descriptor: Abdulrahman is a sweet 4-year-old Arab Muslim boy, Khalid's little brother — similar features to Khalid (short deep-black hair, big warm brown eyes, soft wheat skin) but younger and smaller with chubby toddler cheeks, wearing a small black-and-gold thobe and a little olive-gold kufi cap

lantern.descriptor: an ornate antique Arabian brass-and-gold lantern (fanous) with intricate Islamic geometric patterns, emitting a warm magical golden glow

temp_characters._note: Episodic guest characters (humans / animals / birds). The Art Director registers them here per episode with a descriptor (and optional ref under assets/characters/temp/). They follow the same 3D Pixar style and pass the Shariah + child-development gates like any character.

kitten.descriptor: a small friendly thirsty tabby kitten, big cute eyes, expressive and wholesome, 3D Pixar style

elevenlabs_voices._voice_notes: خالد=Khalid MJ(young ar male)✓  زينة=Gungun(child, was Noor)✓  تيتا=Sawsan(old ar female, PENDING user pick vs Nieve)  جدو=needs casting(elderly ar male)  عبد الرحمن=needs casting+role

cover_prompt: Warm storybook cover illustration: a cheerful 7-year-old Arab Muslim boy in a black thobe with gold embroidery and olive-gold kufi cap, a sweet little girl in a light-blue headscarf and dress, a kind smiling grandmother in a cream hijab and a gentle grandfather with a white beard and kufi, gathered together in a sunny garden around an ornate glowing golden Arabian lantern that radiates warm magical light, a small friendly kitten nearby, 3D Pixar style
endcard_prompt: A single ornate antique Arabian brass-and-gold lantern (fanous) with intricate Islamic geometric patterns glowing with a warm magical golden light, floating gently in a soft cozy dark-blue night background with tiny sparkles, peaceful and heartwarming
